emails.body: Direct Access Grandfather Provision Conference Call Please let me know if you are available for this call at 5:00 p.m. or 5:30 p.m. today, April 19, 2001. If so, I will send out a call in number. Thank you.

emails.subject: Direct Access Grandfather Provision Conference Call
emails.subject_base: Direct Access Grandfather Provision Conference Call
emails.body: Direct Access Grandfather Provision Conference Call We are not going to be able to have the Direct Access call this afternoon at 5:00 p.m. CDT after all. We will need to schedule this call for tomorrow morning. Please send me your availability by reply or I can be reached at (713) 345-6355. Thank you for your help.
